locations.name: Dangar Falls, Dorrigo, New South Wales, Australia

details.description: A broad block-style waterfall drops over a dark, columnar rock escarpment into a deep green plunge pool. The flow is segmented into several thick curtains, producing mist where it hits the pool. Vegetation clings to ledges at the brink, with small grassy islets and a fallen log visible in the river just above the drop. Dense, moist forest surrounds the scene, and the view is from an elevated lookout or rim, looking down into the amphitheater-like basin. Swimmers are visible in the pool, underscoring the site’s popularity as a swimming hole. Lighting is overcast, giving soft, even tones with minimal shadows.

details.description: A wide, multi-jet waterfall plunges over a rocky cliff into a dark green pool. The curtain of white water is segmented by sections of rock and is framed by steep, mossy rock faces and dense rainforest vegetation. Above the falls, the river appears to flow calmly, with a fallen log visible on the upper bank. Mist rises where the water hits the pool, suggesting a strong cascade. In the lower right of the pool, a few swimmers are visible, giving a sense of scale. The overall setting appears to be a rainforest-clad gorge with a designated viewing area, consistent with Dangar Falls and its nearby reserve in Dorrigo, New South Wales, Australia.

details.description: A high-angle, scenic photograph capturing Dangar Falls in Dorrigo, Australia. The image features a wide waterfall cascading approximately 30 meters over a basalt rock ledge into a large, dark green plunge pool below. The water creates a textured white curtain as it falls, breaking into multiple streams across the rock face. The top of the falls shows the Bielsdown River flowing calmly through lush green vegetation and trees before dropping over the edge; a weathered log is visible lodged in the riverbed upstream. To the left, a rugged cliff face reveals layered rock formations covered in moss and small ferns. On the right, dense foliage frames the waterfall. In the pool below, tiny figures of swimmers can be seen in the water, providing a sense of scale to the landscape.

details.description: A high-angle view of Dangar Falls, a wide curtain-style waterfall cascading over a rugged basalt cliff into a large, deep swimming hole. The water in the pool is a murky green, and several people are visible swimming near the base of the falls. The surrounding landscape is characterized by lush, dense temperate rainforest vegetation. The river feeding the falls is visible at the top, flowing through a rocky channel. The rock face to the left of the waterfall shows distinct geological textures and weathering.

details.description: A broad curtain waterfall drops over a dark, rocky basalt cliff into a round green plunge pool. Several swimmers are visible in the pool below the falls. The water splits into multiple strands over small ledges and vegetation clumps at the brink, with a fallen log near the top. Dense, lush forest surrounds the scene, and the perspective is from an elevated lookout across the pool on an overcast day.

details.description: A broad curtain-style waterfall plunges from a rocky basalt cliff into a round plunge pool. The flow splits into several parallel streams over a vegetated lip with tufts of grass and a fallen log visible just upstream. Dense green bush surrounds the cliff edges. The water drops vertically and creates mist where it hits the pool; several swimmers are visible in the pool below. The image is taken from an elevated viewpoint slightly to the side of the falls, under overcast light.

details.description: A broad waterfall plunges over a rocky cliff into a dark pool below. The falls consist of multiple narrow cascades, creating a heavy spray and mist that rises from the plunge. The surrounding cliff faces are rugged and dark, with patches of green vegetation clinging to ledges. At the top of the falls, a river continues, with a fallen log spanning part of the water. Dense green trees and shrubs frame the scene along the gorge, giving a lush, tropical-tinged impression. In the pool beneath the waterfall, a few people are visible swimming, appearing as small, orange-tinted figures against the rippled surface of the water.

details.description: A high-angle, eye-level view of a wide waterfall cascading over a rocky precipice into a large, dark green plunge pool below. The waterfall features a broad curtain of white water, broken slightly by the uneven lip of the falls. To the left of the falls, a steep, rugged cliff face is visible, characterized by blocky, layered rock formations (likely basalt) with patches of moss and vegetation clinging to the crevices. The top of the falls is lined with lush green vegetation, including trees and shrubs typical of a temperate rainforest or sclerophyll forest environment. The river feeding the falls flows from the upper right background. In the pool at the base of the falls, several small figures (swimmers) can be seen, providing a sense of scale to the landscape. The water in the pool is calm with ripples radiating from the impact zone of the falls.

details.description: A high-angle shot of a wide curtain waterfall cascading over a dark basalt rock face into a large, green-tinted plunge pool. The waterfall is divided into several distinct streams by small grassy outcrops at the crest. Lush green vegetation and native forest surround the falls, with a rocky cliff visible on the left side. Several people are seen swimming in the pool at the base of the falls. The lighting is overcast and diffused, highlighting the white foam of the falling water against the dark rocks and green foliage.

details.description: A wide, multi-segment curtain waterfall drops from a rocky ledge into a circular green plunge pool surrounded by dense forest. The crest shows patches of grass and a large fallen log resting near the lip, where the river spreads over shallow rock before plunging. Mist rises from the impact zone, and several swimmers are visible in the pool below. The left wall exposes banded/columnar volcanic-looking rock; vegetation clings to the cliff edges. Overcast, diffuse light enhances the lush greens and wet rock surfaces.

details.description: A high-angle view of a waterfall cascading over a rocky cliff into a wide pool. The cliff faces are rugged with exposed stone and are fringed by dense green vegetation. Water falls in multiple thin curtains, creating mist at the basin and churning ripples on the surface below. A fallen log rests across the upper river above the falls. The scene is framed by trees and shrubs on both sides, suggesting a canyon-like environment. The vantage point appears to be from a vantage point above the waterfall, looking down toward the pool where a few swimmers are visible.
